strengths: 15+ years of deep, cross-stack software engineering experience spanning cloud, AI infrastructure, and high-performance systems, directly matching the role's minimum requirement and technical scope.

Proven track record of building and open-sourcing AI-adjacent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) and data platforms (GISCollective) with real-world adoption, demonstrating builder fluency in AI-powered product development.

Consistent leadership in technical innovation through workshops, open-source contributions, and cross-functional product ownership — aligning with the need to inspire teams and advise on disruptive AI/cloud strategies.
concerns: No explicit mention of a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, though practical AI experience compensates for this preferred qualification.
Limited public evidence of direct cloud platform strategy work at scale (e.g., AWS/GCP/Azure product roadmaps), though AWS CDK and Kubernetes usage imply relevant exposure.
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may pose minor operational challenges in a Berlin-based role requiring deep local stakeholder alignment.
response.justification: Bogdan’s 15+ years of hands-on engineering across cloud-native systems, AI-agent tooling, and high-performance infrastructure — combined with his proven ability to build and evangelize open-source platforms like GISCollective and MCP-compatible frameworks — makes him a rare fit for a director-level IC role demanding both technical depth and strategic influence in AI and cloud product evolution.
